mapper.select: SELECT cd.code_value AS value, cd.code_name AS label FROM code_group cg INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_group_seq = cg.code_group_seq WHERE cg.code_group_id = 'A0005' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY cd.sort_order ASC, cd.code_detail_seq ASC

SELECT cd.code_value AS value, cd.code_name AS label FROM code_group cg INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_group_seq = cg.code_group_seq WHERE cg.code_group_id = 'A0006' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY cd.sort_order ASC, cd.code_detail_seq ASC

SELECT cd.code_id AS codeId, cd.attr1 AS attr1, cd.code_name AS codeName, cd.code_value AS codeValue FROM code_detail cd INNER JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq WHERE cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0006' AND cd.code_id IN ('A00052', 'A00053') ORDER BY cd.sort_order ASC, cd.code_detail_seq ASC

SELECT br.blacklist_report_seq AS blacklistReportSeq, br.blacklist_target_id AS blacklistTargetId, CASE WHEN IFNULL(br.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN #{blindListTitle} ELSE br.title END AS title, CASE WHEN IFNULL(br.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN '' ELSE br.content END AS content, br.writer_member_seq AS writerMemberSeq, wm.member_id AS writerMemberId, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writerProfileImageUrl, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(br.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writerName, br.category_code AS categoryCode, CASE WHEN cg.code_group_seq IS NOT NULL THEN cd.code_name END AS categoryName, br.view_count AS viewCount, br.like_count AS likeCount, br.dislike_count AS dislikeCount, br.comment_count AS commentCount, br.report_count AS reportCount, br.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, br.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, DATE_FORMAT(br.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(br.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM blacklist_report_board br LEFT JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = br.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0005' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = br.writer_member_seq
ORDER BY
br.like_count DESC,
br.blacklist_report_seq DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT br.blacklist_report_seq AS blacklistReportSeq, br.blacklist_target_id AS blacklistTargetId, br.title, br.content, br.writer_member_seq AS writerMemberSeq, wm.member_id AS writerMemberId, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writerProfileImageUrl, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(br.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writerName, br.category_code AS categoryCode, CASE WHEN cg.code_group_seq IS NOT NULL THEN cd.code_name END AS categoryName, br.view_count AS viewCount, br.like_count AS likeCount, br.dislike_count AS dislikeCount, br.comment_count AS commentCount, br.report_count AS reportCount, br.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, br.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, DATE_FORMAT(br.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(br.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM blacklist_report_board br LEFT JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = br.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0005' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = br.writer_member_seq WHERE br.blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND br.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blacklist_report_board ( blacklist_target_id, title, content, category_code, comment_allowed_yn, reply_allowed_yn, writer_member_seq, writer_name, view_count, like_count, dislike_count, comment_count, report_count, use_yn, create_dt, create_id, create_ip, modify_dt, modify_id, modify_ip ) VALUES ( #{blacklistTargetId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{categoryCode}, #{commentAllowedYn}, #{replyAllowedYn}, #{writerMemberSeq}, #{writerName}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{dislikeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{reportCount}, 'Y', NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), #{modifyId}, #{modifyIp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE blacklist_report_board SET blacklist_target_id = #{blacklistTargetId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, comment_allowed_yn = #{commentAllowedYn}, reply_allowed_yn = #{replyAllowedYn}, modify_dt = NOW(), modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp} WHERE blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE blacklist_report_board SET use_yn = 'N', modify_dt = NOW() WHERE blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE blacklist_report_board SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE blacklist_report_board SET like_count = IFNULL(like_count, 0) + 1 WHERE blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE blacklist_report_board SET dislike_count = IFNULL(dislike_count, 0) + 1 WHERE blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE blacklist_report_board SET report_count = IFNULL(report_count, 0) + 1 WHERE blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE blacklist_report_board SET comment_count = IFNULL(comment_count, 0) + 1 WHERE blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE blacklist_report_board SET comment_count = GREATEST(IFNULL(comment_count, 0) + #{delta}, 0) WHERE blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO board_action_log ( board_kind, target_kind, target_seq, action_type, member_seq, member_id, client_ip, create_dt ) VALUES ( #{boardKind}, #{targetKind}, #{targetSeq}, #{actionType}, #{memberSeq}, #{memberId}, #{clientIp}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT br.blacklist_report_seq AS blacklistReportSeq, br.blacklist_target_id AS blacklistTargetId, br.title, br.content, br.writer_member_seq AS writerMemberSeq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(br.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writerName, br.view_count AS viewCount, br.like_count AS likeCount, br.dislike_count AS dislikeCount, DATE_FORMAT(br.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(br.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM blacklist_report_board br LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = br.writer_member_seq
ORDER BY br.blacklist_target_id ASC, br.blacklist_report_seq DESC LIMIT 10000
